backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Resume and related types, with a session-token-keyed in-memory map supporting saveResume, getResume, and deleteResume operations. Also includes blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of broken PDF download functionality with a 'Save as HTML' download in useDownloadPDF.ts and App.tsx, mapped to test ID REQ-13.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, utility, and style file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Resume Builder Vite/React app, mounting the React root at #root and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component rendering a welcome screen or the full resume builder UI with a sticky header, split form/preview layout, save and 'Save as HTML' download actions, and a mobile FAB.
frontend/src/components/CertificationsSe: Repeatable form section for certification entries (name, issuer, issue date, expiry date) with add and remove controls.
frontend/src/components/EducationSection: Repeatable form section for education entries (degree, major, institution, graduation year) with add and remove controls.
frontend/src/components/ExperienceSectio: Repeatable form section for work experience entries (job title, company, start/end dates, description textarea) with add and remove controls.
frontend/src/components/PersonalInfoSect: Form section component for editing personal information fields (name, job title, email, phone, address, summary, LinkedIn, GitHub) within a resume form.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePhotoSect: Component that handles profile photo upload via file input, displays a preview with a remove button, and manages blob URL lifecycle to prevent memory leaks.
Form section for managing a dynamic list of resume projects, each with name, tech stack, link, and description fields, supporting add/remove operations.
frontend/src/components/ResumeForm.tsx: Main resume form component that composes all section sub-components (personal info, education, experience, skills, projects, certifications) inside an accordion layout with a profile photo section at the top.
frontend/src/components/ResumePreview.ts: Read-only resume preview component that renders the full resume layout (header, contact, summary, education, experience, skills, projects, certifications) as styled inline HTML, including a dot-based skill level indicator.
frontend/src/components/SkillsSection.ts: Form section for managing a dynamic list of skills, each with a name input and a proficiency level selector (Beginner to Expert), supporting add/remove rows.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeScreen.ts: Renders a full-screen welcome/landing page with a logo, feature highlights, and a 'Get Started' CTA button that calls the `onStart` callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadPDF.ts: Custom hook that generates a styled HTML resume document from `ResumeFormData` and triggers a browser download, converting profile photos to base64 data URLs in the process.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exposes `useGetResume` and `useSaveResume` hooks that fetch and persist resume data to the ICP backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useResumeData.ts: Manages resume form state with local storage persistence and backend sync, providing mapping utilities between the local `ResumeFormData` shape and the backend `Resume` type.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, enforces form input visibility, and includes print styles to isolate the resume preview.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/types/resume.ts: Defines TypeScript types and interfaces for resume form data including PersonalInfo, Education, Experience, Skill, Project, and Certification, along with factory functions that return default empty values for each.
frontend/src/utils/sessionToken.ts: Provides utility functions to generate, store, and retrieve a random session token in localStorage, used to identify users without requiring login.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations including fade-in and accordion transitions.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 13) for a resume builder app, documenting existing features, architectural decisions, and known issues such as empty preview rendering and invisible form text.
